name: lacon
description: Token-lean data query interface for agents. Query CSV/Parquet/JSON via curated DuckDB primitives — no file dumping.

interface.shortDescription: Query data files without dumping them into context.
interface.longDescription: Token-lean agent↔data interface. Query CSV/Parquet/JSON using curated DuckDB primitives (describe/sample/count/query/aggregate/filter) and get back minimal, shaped answers.
defaultPrompt: Use lacon primitives when working with data files. Start with describe, then sample, then targeted queries. Never dump files into context.
